name: Coconut Curry Tofu

source.cookbook: The Complete and Authentic Thai Curry Cookbook 2
source.author: Various

method: Let the tofu drain of all moisture.
Heat the oil in a skillet.
Drain the tofu and set it aside.
Add the coconut milk and heat.
Stir in soy sauce, sugar, curry powder, grated ginger, and Sriracha sauce.
Stir until the milk is boiling.
Add the fried tofu, tomatoes, red pepper, mushrooms, and scallion.
Season with salt and add spinach.
Cook for approximately about 3 minutes until the spinach wilts.
